title: Formspec Respondent Ledger
description: A top-level append-only respondent-side audit ledger layered on top of a canonical Formspec Response. The ledger provides material history for drafts, resumes, attachments, submissions, amendments, stops, migrations, validation snapshots, and optional field-level editing changelogs without changing core Response semantics.

$formspecRespondentLedger.description: Respondent Ledger add-on specification version. MUST be '0.1'.

ledgerId.description: Stable identifier for this ledger document.

responseId.description: Identifier of the current canonical Formspec Response described by this ledger.

definitionUrl.description: Canonical URL of the pinned Definition currently associated with the response.

definitionVersion.description: Exact pinned Definition version currently associated with the response.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the response/ledger pair.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of the first recorded event in the ledger.

lastEventAt.description: Timestamp of the most recent recorded event in the ledger.

eventCount.description: Total number of retained events in the ledger.

organizationId.description: Organization or tenant identifier when the implementation is multi-tenant.

environment.description: Environment label such as production, staging, or sandbox.

currentResponseAuthored.description: Most recent Response.authored timestamp known to the ledger.

headEventId.description: Identifier of the newest retained event in the ledger.

identityRefs.description: Identifiers for identity, DID, or proof-of-personhood attestations materially associated with this ledger.

sessionRefs.description: Identifiers for known session segments that contributed events to this ledger.

checkpointRefs.description: Identifiers for checkpoints covering contiguous ranges of ledger events.

changelogMode.description: Capture mode for respondent-side changes. 'material' captures material lifecycle deltas; 'field-level' captures a durable ChangeSetEntry for each persisted response field path changed at a durable boundary.

changelogBoundaries.description: Durable boundaries at which field-level changelog deltas are captured. Required when changelogMode is 'field-level'.

events.description: Optional embedded event stream retained with the ledger document.

checkpoints.description: Optional embedded integrity checkpoints for contiguous event ranges.

checkpointId.description: Stable identifier for the checkpoint object.

ledgerId.description: Identifier of the ledger sealed by this checkpoint.

fromSequence.description: First event sequence included in the sealed contiguous range.

toSequence.description: Last event sequence included in the sealed contiguous range.

signedAt.description: Timestamp when the checkpoint was signed or otherwise sealed.

signature.description: Opaque signature or detached proof blob for the checkpoint.

keyId.description: Identifier of the signing key used for this checkpoint.

anchorRef.description: External anchor reference, such as an organizational audit ledger record or transparency log entry.

algorithm.description: Signature or hashing algorithm identifier used to produce the checkpoint material.

HashString.description: Algorithm-prefixed digest or integrity token, such as 'sha256:...'.

Extensions.description: Implementation-specific extension data. Keys must be namespaced with an 'x-' prefix.
